## Overview

**Name:** Nate Brooks
**Role:** Software Engineer I
**Team:** Platform

## Communication Preferences

> Populated over time. What works, what doesn't.

- Joined December 2025 — first job out of college
- Asks lots of questions — good instinct, don't discourage
- Struggles with open-ended tasks — give starter questions or pair for the first hour
- Gets overwhelmed by too many reviewers on a single PR — limit to two
- Very responsive to specific, actionable feedback — less so to vague "make it better" notes
